name: Wild Rice with Chili
recipeIngredient: 240 g parboiled rice with wild rice (3 dl)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onions in oil until translucent.
2. Add chili and rice to the pan.
3. Pour in the vegetable broth.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes covered.
5. Remove from heat and let stand for 5-10 minutes.
6. Fluff with a fork using a spoon.
7. Garnish with chili and fresh chives if desired.
